summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Moobits bilingual bakery landing site. Tested all 5 pages (Home, About, Menu, Order Guide, FAQ), bilingual switching with localStorage persistence, product cards (cookies + best sellers), price/discount badges, WhatsApp deep-links, menu filters (All/Cookies/Bolu Mini/Bolu BIG/Brownies), FAQ accordion single-open behavior, footer contact info, mobile responsiveness (390px viewport), promo banner translation, and category-card navigation. Total 59/59 tests passed across two test runs. Zero console errors on any page.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well organised: pages, components, i18n context, products data are cleanly separated.
LanguageContext persists selection in localStorage under key 'moobits_lang' as specified — works across navigations.
ProductCard renders -20% discount badge, original price strikethrough (Rp10.000), and discounted price (Rp8.000) correctly for Cookies; Best Seller cards (Rp5.000) correctly skip strikethrough.
WhatsApp deep-link uses correct number 6283894855149 with URL-encoded product name (e.g. 'Halo Moobits, aku mau order The Classic OG ya.').
All 14 products distributed correctly across categories (4 Cookies, 6 Bolu Mini, 2 Bolu BIG, 2 Brownies); menu filters validated counts match.
data-testid coverage on all interactive elements (nav links, language toggles, CTAs, mobile drawer, product cards, FAQ triggers, filter buttons) is excellent — enables robust automated testing.
Mobile drawer correctly hides desktop nav at 390px and exposes all 5 links + lang toggle + Order CTA.

Promo banner copy fully translates between ID ('Diskon 20% khusus semua varian cookies' / 'Bundling Cookies 4 Varian: Diskon 10%') and EN ('20% off for all cookie variants only' / '4-Variant Cookie Bundling: 10% Off').
FAQ uses Radix-style accordion with single-open behavior (data-state attribute toggles correctly).
No backend dependency for Phase 1 — frontend is fully static as expected. REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL set but not invoked.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 MVP is solid. If a backend phase is added later, focus on integrating WhatsApp order tracking or admin endpoints. Current static React app works correctly with bilingual ID/EN switching (localStorage key 'moobits_lang'). All data-testid selectors specified in review_request exist and work. Public URL: https://moobits-launch.preview.emergentagent.com/.
rca of the issue: No issues to RCA — all tests passed.
